GeneralComments:
Does a all-in-one location sound good to you?
Well, the City Lodge Hotel in Lynnwood is the place for you. With a café serving all day meals, a fitness room, meeting rooms and a place to lay down your head, why would you  ever want to leave.
Not forgeiting an EV charge, making commute in your EV easier.
